$comment: Normatively defined by the AIP Resource Registration rules. A Registered Resource Record binds an RFC 9728 resource identifier to the authorization server and optional Enterprise IdP federation metadata used during token exchange.
title: AIP Registered Resource Record
description: Registry-stored authorization configuration for a target resource used by token exchange and Enterprise IdP federation.

resource_id.description: Lowercase SHA-256 digest of the UTF-8 resource_uri value.

resource_uri.description: RFC 9728 resource identifier for the protected resource.

authorization_server.description: Authorization server URI for this resource. This can be the AIP Registry itself or an external authorization server.

status.description: Only active resource records are eligible for token-exchange matching.

owner_did.description: OPTIONAL. DID of the resource owner or operator authorized to manage this record.

scopes_supported.description: OPTIONAL. AIP scope identifiers that this resource can accept through token exchange.

enterprise_idp_required.description: When true, token exchange requests targeting this resource MUST use the Enterprise IdP Federation Profile.

enterprise_idp_issuer.description: CONDITIONAL. OIDC issuer identifier for the Enterprise IdP when enterprise_idp_required is true.

enterprise_idp_token_endpoint.description: CONDITIONAL. Enterprise IdP token endpoint used by the Registry for secondary token exchange.

enterprise_idp_client_id.description: CONDITIONAL. Registry client_id registered with the Enterprise IdP.

created_at.description: UTC timestamp when this resource record was created.

updated_at.description: UTC timestamp when this resource record was last modified.
